Class EfsFile<E extends IEfsEvent>

java.lang.Object
org.efs.io.EfsFile<E>
Type Parameters:
E - efs event type.
All Implemented Interfaces:
IEfsAgent
@ThreadSafe public final class EfsFile<E extends IEfsEvent> extends Object implements IEfsAgent
Stores efs events indexed by publish timestamp and row index where row index is unique and monotonically increases. Publish timestamp may not be unique but does increase.

This class is in-progress.

Author:
Charles W. Rapp

  • Nested Class Summary

    Nested Classes
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    static final class 
    EfsFile.Retrieval<E extends IEfsEvent>
    Acts as a subscription to future events added to ef file.

  • Field Summary

    Fields
    Modifier and Type
    Field
    Description
    static final String
    INVALID_DISPATCHER
    An EfsDispatcher name which is either null, an empty string, or blanks only results in an IllegalArgumentException with message "dispatcher is either null, an empty string, or blanks".
    static final String
    NULL_AGENT
    A null agent results in a NullPointerException with message "agent is null".
    static final String
    NULL_CLOCK
    A null clock results in a NullPointerException with message "clock is null".
    static final String
    NULL_CONDITION
    A null retrieval condition results in a NullPointerException with message "condition is null".
    static final String
    NULL_DONE_CALLBACK
    A null retrieval complete callback results in a NullPointerException with message "completion callback is null".
    static final String
    NULL_EVENT
    A null event results in a NullPointerException with message "event is null".
    static final String
    NULL_EVENT_CALLBACK
    A null event retrieval callback results in a NullPointerException with message "event callback is null".
    static final String
    NULL_INTERVAL
    A null interval results in a NullPointerException with message "interval is null".
    static final String
    NULL_TOPIC_KEY
    A null EfsTopicKey argument results in a NullPointerException with message "key is null".
    static final String
    PUBLISH_TIMESTAMP_ATTRIBUTE
    EfsRow.getPublishTimestamp() attribute named "publishTimestamp".
    static final String
    ROW_INDEX_ATTRIBUTE
    EfsRow.getRowIndex() attribute named "rowIndex".
    static final String
    UNKNOWN_DISPATCHER
    A dispatcher name which does not reference a known dispatcher results in an IllegalArgumentException with message "\"%s\" is an unknown dispatcher".
    static final String
    UNREGISTERED_AGENT
    An agent which is not registered with a dispatcher results in an IllegalStateException with message "\"%s\" is not registered with a dispatcher".

  • Method Details

    • name

      public String name()
      Returns uniquely identifying file name.
      Specified by:
      name in interface IEfsAgent
      Returns:
      efs file name.

    • topicKey

      public EfsTopicKey<E> topicKey()
      Returns file topic key.
      Returns:
      topic key.

    • rowCount

      public long rowCount()
      Returns approximate number of rows in efs file. These reason this value is approximate is due to rows are added asynchronously to file. It is possible that at the time of this call, new rows are being added.
      Returns:
      approximate row count.

    • getSystemClock

      public static Clock getSystemClock()
      Returns currently configured system clock.
      Returns:
      current system clock.

    • setSystemClock

      public static Clock setSystemClock(Clock clock)
      Sets system clock used to obtain Instant values, returning replaced system clock. This method is mainly used by unit tests to put a fixed clock in place. This allows for tests to always use the same time.
      Parameters:
      clock - replaces current system clock.
      Returns:
      replaced system clock.
      Throws:
      NullPointerException - if clock is null.

    • add

      public Instant add(E event)
      TODO
      Parameters:
      event - event added to efs file.
      Returns:
      efs event retrieval subscription.
      See Also:
      • retrieve(EfsInterval, Query, Consumer, Consumer, IEfsAgent)

    • retrieve

      @Nonnull public EfsFile.Retrieval<E> retrieve(@Nonnull EfsInterval interval, @Nonnull com.googlecode.cqengine.query.Query<E> condition, @Nonnull Consumer<EfsRow<E>> eventCB, @Nonnull Consumer<RetrievalCompleteEvent<E>> completionCB, @Nonnull IEfsAgent agent)
      TODO
      Parameters:
      interval - forward only those events within this interval.
      condition - forward only those events which match this condition.
      eventCB - forward matching events to this callback.
      completionCB - when retrieval is complete, post RetrievalCompleteEvent to this callback.
      agent - forward matching events to this agent.
      Returns:
      returns an event retrieval subscription.
      Throws:
      NullPointerException - if any of the arguments is null.
      IllegalStateException - if agent is not registered with a dispatcher.
      See Also:
      • add(IEfsEvent)

    • openEventFile

      public static <E extends IEfsEvent> EfsFile<E> openEventFile(EfsTopicKey<E> key, String dispatcher)
      TODO
      Type Parameters:
      E - efs event type.
      Parameters:
      key - efs event class and topic key.
      dispatcher - efs file is associated with this dispatcher.
      Returns:
      open efs file.
      Throws:
      NullPointerException - if key is null.
      IllegalArgumentException - if dispatcher is either a null, empty, or blank or is not a known dispatcher.
